item.dc:creator: Magemenes

item.title: Mother cat introduces her children to her human friend
item.dc:creator: MemeDawg101

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1182 (Discworld theme dump)
item.description:
A while back, probably about 6 months ago, someone asked, "Hey, can you do a Discworld Themed Dump?" At the time, I said no. But I started saving up every Discworld Meme I found anyway. And now, person whose username I can not recall... this is for you. Well, and for everyone who likes Discworld. 48 Discworld memes, and that's cutting me own throat. Let's go down to the Dwarven bread museum.
For the record: yes, you should read Discworld. No, it really doesn't matter where you start, though I would personally recommend beginning with one of the stand-alone books like Pyramids, Small Gods, or The Truth.
Are you Trans? Concerned about Trans appearances in fiction? Cheery Littlebottom may be the character just for you. This Dwarf appears in the City Watch series. Leaving the whole thing deliberately vague for you to discover, my partners in creation. Sir Terry was "woke" before "woke" was really a thing.
The Discworld may also contain the ONE exception to ACAB, in the form of Captain Carrot This is not Captain Carrot. This is Sam Vimes. He *absolutely* knows he's a bastard. He's the other major subversion to the trope.
I envy everyone who discovers The Discworld for the first time.
Mort is another good starting point.
Pippin tax! Today's message from Pippin: "Hey Cody. Come here. I love you." (Silly cooing noises)
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett

item.title: Half an Oodle of Unmuted Faves
item.description:
Troy Hawke https://troyhawke.com/
Kiry Shabazz https://www.instagram.com/kirybazz
https://www.instagram.com/shnootle.hound
Imgurian @iplaythepiano, playing his own composition! :O Upvotes go here: https://imgur.com/gallery/NbqL8qH Edited to add his insta: https://www.instagram.com/carrandi13
Michigan Animal Rescue League https://marl.org/ Edited to add: Appalachian Smoothbrain, Silly Little Guy, Goofy Little Man, and Portuguese Cow Hound are all still looking for a home. <3
@misterdoctorhuongybear on the site that must not be named but is clearly visible in the video. ----- For more unmuted faves, just click on the #oodles tag.
item.dc:creator: ParallelParkingInABurka

item.dc:creator: deafkitten

item.title: Vaulting across the canal
item.description: Fierljeppen (West-Frisian compound of fier—"far" and ljeppen—"leaping") or polsstokverspringen is a traditional sport of the West Frisian people in the Dutch province of Fryslân. The sport is nowadays also popular in the province of Utrecht which produced record holder Jaco de Groot. Source: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Fierljeppen
item.dc:creator: OneInThePinkTwoInTheStink

item.description: but that can also be said about most things... professional sports, vegetarianism, yu-gi-oh, anime, video games... I love most of those, but it takes more than 1 piece to make a puzzle people...

item.title: And now for something completely different #509

item.title: Images of Note: Stop your pooping
item.description:
https://youtu.be/dbJABjVH-0k
mood
Wasn't a waterproof suit a James Bond thing.
BURGERCHEESE BURGERCHEESE BURGERCHEESE BURGERCHEESE BURGERCHEESE BURGERCHEESE BURGERCHEESE BURGERCHEESE BURGERCHEESE BURGERCHEESE BURGERCHEESE BURGERCHEESE BURGERCHEESE BURGERCHEESE BURGERCHEESE BURGERCHEESE BURGERCHEESE BURGERCHEESE BURGERCHEESE
We don't have Carl's Jr here but yeah this looks like something you'd eat to stop pooping.
Freedom is where you blindly praise the state!
"They beat Jesus with that" is what I am going to say about everything that can be used as a flail.
Their business was a meme-creating AI that somehow predicted the future.
All hail.
it is not wimdy rn but it fuckin rainy.
Thank you, lax safety standards in Birmingham factories.
If you can make an Afrikaner go "wot de fook" at your colonial era crimes, you need to look at yourself in the mirror.
Truly a flag to be proud of.
I say this as someone on the spectrum but fuck that car, it's infantalising and the puzzle piece is an Autism Speaks symbol, and fuck Autism Speaks.
The farmer in Stardew Valley is a Cryptid.
That cat has seen another cat.
For Chats: http://discord.abbii.gay For Shitposts: http://tumblr.abbii.gay For srs and maybe shitposts: http://mastodon.abbii.gay Also STREEEEEEEEEEEEAM: http://twitch.abbii.gay
item.dc:creator: abbiistabbii

item.dc:creator: blank666man

item.title: Creating a new laboratory from scratch in the old cluttered room
item.description:
I needed extra space for my new laboratory for my research group. Fortunately, I was allocated a cluttered room in poor condition, which I decided to renovate together with my colleagues. None of us had ever done repairs before, but we were greatly assisted by detailed videos on YouTube. You can check plenty of "in progress" pics below. Also i've made video hosted on Youtube: https://youtu.be/-X6Ex_Acflg?si=mCpnjjP4Bxn9QbvB
When we opened the room, there were several tons of outdated scientific equipment that needed to be relocated. It took 2 days of work.  The floor, ceiling, and walls were in very poor condition with obvious signs of water damage."
Transporting the old equipment to another storage facility.
The condition of the room after the first day of work
The condition of the room after 2 days of work
Inspecting the condition of the walls after removing the clutter.
Room is fully cleaned and ready for renovation process
Сlearing the surface of the ceiling from loosely adhering and damaged plaster/concrete
Just finished grinding the walls from loosely adhering and damaged plaster/concrete
The ceiling and walls have been sanded. The lower parts of the walls have been smoothed with a diamond cup wheel to remove damp and loose areas.
Patching up the holes in the ceiling using tile adhesive.
All holes and cracks in the walls and ceiling are filled with tile adhesive.
"It was decided to create a brick finish imitation for the back wall. For this, I'm using a template and plaster.
Prepared the floor for pouring with a self-leveling cement-based compound. Later, it turned out to be a mistake
As you can see, the floor turned out horribly, especially its far half. The main reason was that we didn't prime the floor properly, and as soon as we started pouring the mixture, the floor instantly absorbed all the water from it, and the mixture didn't spread. The main issue was with the old floor coating, which resembled asphalt with a lot of cracks. We primed it multiple times, but the right step would have been to completely remove this coating down to the concrete. We thought we would save time, but in reality, we ended up having to redo the floor later on.
Preparing the assembly of the motor and filter for the supply ventilation.
Using a 160mm diameter drill, we drilled a hole in the wall for the supply ventilation pipe.
Using a laser, we mark the holes for the frame of the drywall box, which will cover the unsightly beam and accommodate the ventilation system, as well as electrical wires.
We started plastering the right wall. Due to the large number of pipes, working with the upper part of the wall is very difficult.
Whole right wall is plastered.
Finishing drywall box
Flexible duct for supply ventilation.
To fix the previously poorly done self-leveling floor, we are setting up beacons made of tile adhesive for subsequent leveling.
Applied tile adhesive to the floor along the beacons.
Plastered the right wall and finished brick imitation on the back wall
Plastered drywall box
Removing old door frame
Door frame removed
New metal door installed
Sanded walls and ceiling
Before painting the walls and ceiling, we covered the right wall with plastic sheeting and painted the pipes black and red.
Using high-quality painter's tape, we set up a line separating the walls and the ceiling (they will be painted in different colors).
We covered the side walls with plastic sheeting. The room is ready for painting the ceiling, as well as the front and back walls.
We used white exterior paint with high vapor permeability.
Front/back walls and ceiling are painted white. Time for side walls
Painting side walls with the same type exterior paint but another color.
The painting is complete
Starting the assembly of the exhaust ventilation system.
Exhaust ventilation system complete
Installing ceiling lights. We painted the lights black beforehand.
Mounted lights for back wall
Wiring layout for sockets in plastic pipes.
Electric wiring complete
Laminate flooring installation
Before/after
Cutting tabletops for the tables in the workshop.
Finished assembling the tables.
Painted the MDF sheet black, which will serve as the base for assembling the slats for the future TV corner.
The sheet is mounted on the wall. Applying markings for the slats.
Preparing beams for slat wall
The beams are installed: they are screwed to the floor and ceiling using dowels and screws.
Preparing for paint.
Beams are painted black.
Unpacking the sofa
Installed TV mount
55" Samsung tv installed
Small cabinet assembled
Installing LED lightning system for TV wall
TV wall lightning power supply
Lightning completed
Assembly of the electrical panel.
Complete
Drywall box covers
Drywall box covers
Installed
Installing LED lightning in the switchboard.
Switchboard cover installed. "Tarusov electrics" is the name of our research group
The lab is finished.
item.dc:creator: Troynoi

item.title: Progress of the Metal battle vest
item.description: Thanks for the upvotes and the comments. I really like to read what you guys think and reply to certain comments. The exchange of different opinions is always really nice and helpful.
item.dc:creator: BjrnGodi

item.title: Boyfriend memes Pt2 (aka things my boyfriend and I send to each other)
item.description:
Some of these have a history and some just give us the giggles.
I find stairs very difficult because of chronic illness and I feel this.
This one just speaks to me.
Makes a big difference.
My favourite bucket.
I like to send these to him because he did physics at uni and I don't even know what the funny S/F bracket thing is. So I send it and then look at him expectantly so he can explain the maths to me so I can forget again later xD
I am this snowman.
"It's the Dara Ó Briain bus" we shout whenever we see these on the road.
At one point I think 5 of my friends were in MLMs, it's just the one now. I'd like to say it's because they saw the light but nah, they just never made any money.
I think Mary Kay and Avon are the only ones they haven't tried.
I can see the samurai every time I read this.
I didn't realise how much WH I knew without knowing it was WH until I met my partner.
Visible relief honestly.
Have to hide the pizza boxes or the betrayal memes start flying.
Magic Bounce Stored Power Espeon bloody hurts.
item.dc:creator: ShinyKokuei7
